name: Flower Cardian Pine
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>花札衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カーディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>松</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned: Draw 1 card, show it, then send it to the GY unless it is a "Flower Cardian" monster. You can only use this effect of "Flower Cardian Pine" once per turn. If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY, or if this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY: You can draw 1 card.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Draw 1 card, show it, then send it to the GY unless it is a "Flower Cardian" monster. You can only use this effect of "Flower Cardian Pine" once per turn. If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY, or if this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY: You can draw 1 card.
eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Draw 1 card, show it, then send it to the GY unless it is a "Flower Cardian" monster. You can only use this effect of "Flower Cardian Pine" once per turn. If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY, or if this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY: You can draw 1 card.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Activates if destroyed by card effect
